name: RPlog_White_Death_Dies
title: Repelling Boarders on the Emendation
summary: The CSAV Emendation is ambushed mid-jump when the White Death pirates drag an asteroid into its flight path, crippling the corvette and forcing its crew to repel boarders in the hangar bay. Captain Gren Delede, Sergeant Jim and his squad of ESPOs, the aging doctor Xar'on, and the mercenary droid AD-01 set up a defense as wave after wave of pirates disgorge from battered shuttles and freighters. The defenders take heavy losses: Xar'on is shot down attempting to rescue a wounded man, Jim falls to enemy fire, and Gren recognizes the white-flightsuited pirate leader as the man who took his eye. Realizing the position is lost, Gren orders a fighting retreat, wounding the pirate leader with a flechette round while AD-01 drags the Sergeant clear and lays down covering fire. Once his people are out, Gren seals the bulkhead and orders the bridge to drop the hangar's magnetic shielding, venting the remaining pirates to explosive decompression and turning defeat into a lethal trap.
